PacketIdentifier: Two Byte Integer Packet Identifier field

MaximumPacketSize: Maximum Packet Size the Client is willing to accept
PacketTooLarge: packet whose size exceeds this limit
packet is too large to send

ResponseTopic: Topic Name for a response message

SendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribeIfNewSubs: if the subscription did not already exist, the Server MUST send all retained messages
if the subscription did exist the Server MUST NOT send the retained messages
DoNotSendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribe: MUST NOT send the retained messages

PacketIdentifierNotFound: 0x92 is the Packet Identifier not found reason code

SendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribe: Send retained messages at the time of the subscribe
SendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribeIfNewSubs: Send retained messages at subscribe only if the subscription does not currently exist
DoNotSendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribe: Do not send retained messages at the time of the subscribe

SendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribeIfNewSubs: Send Retained Messages At Subscribe If New Subscription
DoNotSendRetainedMessagesAtSubscribe: Do Not Send Retained Messages At Subscribe
